description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, rectilinear lines. The structure features a prominent front entrance with a covered porch area and a driveway leading up to the house. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the sides, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The landscaping includes a paved driveway, a walkway, and several trees and shrubs positioned around the property. The exterior appears to be finished in smooth, light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some darker accents around the entrance. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large asymmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and landscaping on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large windows, and the driveway extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back yard area, minimal window openings, and a single tree at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible landscaping, flat roof, and the driveway extending toward the right.
